item.title: US imposes new tariff on Chinese semiconductor imports
item.description: The Biden administration announced a 25% tariff on Chinese semiconductor imports, escalating trade tensions between the two nations.

item.title: Fed signals potential rate cut amid slowing growth
item.description: Federal Reserve officials indicated they may consider a rate cut at the next FOMC meeting as inflation shows signs of easing.

item.title: Tech startup raises $50M in Series B funding
item.description: AI startup TechCo raised $50 million in Series B funding led by Sequoia Capital.

item.title: OPEC announces surprise production cut of 1M barrels per day
item.description: OPEC members agreed to an unexpected production cut, sending oil prices sharply higher amid recession fears.

item.title: EU sanctions on Russian energy exports expanded
item.description: The European Union expanded its sanction regime on Russian energy exports, targeting additional oil and gas companies.

item.title: Apple reports record quarterly revenue
item.description: Apple Inc reported record quarterly revenue of $130 billion, beating analyst expectations.
